text: Muecke M (2026). insidertrade: SEC Insider Trading Transactions. R package version 0.0.0.9000, https://m-muecke.github.io/insidertrade/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {insidertrade: SEC Insider Trading Transactions},   author = {Maximilian Muecke},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.0.9000},   url = {https://m-muecke.github.io/insidertrade/}, }

title: SEC Insider Trading Transactions
text: insidertrade provides access SEC insider trading data (Forms 3/4/5) two sources: Insider transactions bulk data sets (quarterly TSV downloads) EDGAR submissions API (company filing metadata)

title: SEC Insider Trading Transactions
text: can install development version GitHub :

title: SEC Insider Trading Transactions
text: can also look companies ticker fetch insider filings EDGAR:
code: library(data.table) library(insidertrade)  # download and parse all Form 3/4/5 tables for Q2 2024 data <- sec_form345(2025, 4) str(lapply(data, dim)) #> List of 8 #>  $ deriv_holding   : int [1:2] 8223 26 #>  $ deriv_trans     : int [1:2] 20439 42 #>  $ footnotes       : int [1:2] 88855 3 #>  $ nonderiv_holding: int [1:2] 17521 14 #>  $ nonderiv_trans  : int [1:2] 59678 28 #>  $ owner_signature : int [1:2] 39295 3 #>  $ reportingowner  : int [1:2] 39602 13 #>  $ submission      : int [1:2] 36421 14  # get transactions joined with submission and owner details trans <- sec_transactions(2025, 4)  # filter to open-market purchases by officers and directors buys <- trans[   trans_code == "P" &     grepl("Officer|Director", rptowner_relationship) &     trans_date >= "2025-10-01" &     trans_date <= "2025-12-31" ]  # top 10 companies by number of distinct insider buyers buys[, value := trans_shares * trans_pricepershare] top <- buys[,   .(n_insiders = uniqueN(rptownercik), total_usd = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE)),   by = .(ticker = issuertradingsymbol, company = issuername) ] setorder(top, -n_insiders, -total_usd) head(top, 10) #>         ticker                           company n_insiders total_usd #>         <char>                            <char>      <int>     <num> #>  1:        CBC          Central Bancompany, Inc.         17   5104827 #>  2:       MTDR              Matador Resources Co         13   1522756 #>  3:        VAC MARRIOTT VACATIONS WORLDWIDE Corp         12  18231582 #>  4:       HYNE               Hoyne Bancorp, Inc.         10   2428916 #>  5:        OBK              Origin Bancorp, Inc.         10   1023669 #>  6:        CRM                  Salesforce, Inc.          9 200626167 #>  7:        LAB            STANDARD BIOTOOLS INC.          8 115266000 #>  8:       ZBIO             Zenas BioPharma, Inc.          8  33252661 #>  9:        XZO                 Exzeo Group, Inc.          8   2527329 #> 10: HEI, HEI.A                        HEICO CORP          8   1416726  # plot insider purchases over the quarter library(ggplot2)  daily <- buys[,   .(n_purchases = .N, total_shares = sum(trans_shares, na.rm = TRUE)),   by = trans_date ]  ggplot(daily, aes(x = trans_date, y = n_purchases)) +   geom_col() +   scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %d") +   theme_minimal() +   theme(     plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),     panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.2),     panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),     panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),     axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),     axis.title = element_blank()   ) +   labs(title = "Daily Insider Purchases (Q4 2025)") tickers <- sec_tickers() cik <- tickers[ticker == "AAPL", cik] edgar_insider_filings(cik) #>           accessionnumber filing_date reportdate acceptance_datetime    act #>                    <char>      <Date>     <char>              <POSc> <char> #>   1: 0001780525-26-000003  2026-03-06 2026-03-01 2026-03-06 18:30:51        #>   2: 0001059235-26-000004  2026-02-26 2026-02-24 2026-02-26 18:34:19        #>   3: 0001216519-26-000004  2026-02-26 2026-02-24 2026-02-26 18:33:49        #>   4: 0001179864-26-000004  2026-02-26 2026-02-24 2026-02-26 18:33:14        #>   5: 0001214128-26-000004  2026-02-26 2026-02-24 2026-02-26 18:32:41        #>  ---                                                                        #> 604: 0001181431-15-004549  2015-03-12 2015-03-10 2015-03-12 18:34:12        #> 605: 0001181431-15-004548  2015-03-12 2015-03-10 2015-03-12 18:33:47        #> 606: 0001181431-15-004547  2015-03-12 2015-03-10 2015-03-12 18:33:20        #> 607: 0001181431-15-004546  2015-03-12 2015-03-10 2015-03-12 18:32:46        #> 608: 0001181431-15-004545  2015-03-12 2015-03-10 2015-03-12 18:32:12        #>        form filenumber filmnumber  items core_type   size isxbrl isinlinexbrl #>      <char>     <char>     <char> <char>    <char>  <int>  <int>        <int> #>   1:      3                                      3 490535      0            0 #>   2:      4                                      4   5753      0            0 #>   3:      4                                      4   5760      0            0 #>   4:      4                                      4   5734      0            0 #>   5:      4                                      4   7816      0            0 #>  ---                                                                          #> 604:      4                                      4   5481      0            0 #> 605:      4                                      4   5481      0            0 #> 606:      4                                      4   5499      0            0 #> 607:      4                                      4   5473      0     <char>                                 <char> #>   1: xslF345X02/wk-form3_1772839848.xml                                 FORM 3 #>   2: xslF345X05/wk-form4_1772148856.xml                                 FORM 4 #>   3: xslF345X05/wk-form4_1772148826.xml                                 FORM 4 #>   4: xslF345X05/wk-form4_1772148791.xml                                 FORM 4 #>   5: xslF345X05/wk-form4_1772148758.xml                                 FORM 4 #>  ---                                                                           #> 604:           xslF345X03/rrd423481.xml #> 607:           xslF345X03/rrd423484.xml    2015.03.10 SUGAR FORM 4 - RSU GRANT #> 608:           xslF345X03/rrd423485.xml   2015.03.10 WAGNER FORM 4 - RSU GRANT

title: SEC Insider Trading Transactions
text: insiderTrades finreportr edgarWebR finstr tidyedgar XBRL

title: EDGAR insider filings — edgar_insider_filings
text: convenience wrapper around edgar_submissions() filters insider trading forms (Forms 3, 4, 5).

title: EDGAR insider filings — edgar_insider_filings
text: https://www.sec.gov/search-filings/edgar-application-programming-interfaces

title: EDGAR insider filings — edgar_insider_filings
text: cik (integer(1) | character(1)) SEC Central Index Key entity.

title: EDGAR insider filings — edgar_insider_filings
text: data.table::data.table() one row per insider filing.

title: EDGAR insider filings — edgar_insider_filings
code: # \donttest{ # Apple Inc. insider filings insider <- edgar_insider_filings(320193) # }

title: EDGAR company submissions — edgar_submissions
text: Fetch submissions (filing history) given CIK number SEC EDGAR API.

title: EDGAR company submissions — edgar_submissions
text: https://www.sec.gov/search-filings/edgar-application-programming-interfaces

title: EDGAR company submissions — edgar_submissions
text: cik (integer(1) | character(1)) SEC Central Index Key entity.

title: EDGAR company submissions — edgar_submissions
text: data.table::data.table() one row per filing, containing columns accession_number, filing_date, form, primary_document, others.

what: insidertrade: SEC Insider Trading Transactions — insidertrade-package
title: insidertrade: SEC Insider Trading Transactions — insidertrade-package
text: Download parse SEC insider trading data (Forms 3/4/5) quarterly bulk data sets EDGAR submissions API.

title: insidertrade: SEC Insider Trading Transactions — insidertrade-package
text: Maintainer: Maximilian Muecke muecke.maximilian@gmail.com (ORCID)

title: Clear the cache — sec_cache_clear
text: Deletes cached files, including bulk data ZIPs API responses.

title: Clear the cache — sec_cache_clear
text: NULL invisibly.

title: Get the cache directory — sec_cache_dir
text: Returns path directory downloaded SEC data files cached.

title: Get the cache directory — sec_cache_dir
text: character() string path cache directory.

title: SEC Form 3/4/5 bulk data — sec_form345
text: Download parse quarterly bulk ZIP file SEC's insider transactions data sets.

title: SEC Form 3/4/5 bulk data — sec_form345
text: https://www.sec.gov/data-research/sec-markets-data/insider-transactions-data-sets

title: SEC Form 3/4/5 bulk data — sec_form345
text: year (integer(1)) year filing (e.g. 2024). quarter (integer(1)) fiscal quarter. Must 1 4. table (NULL | character()) Table names return. Valid names "deriv_holding", "deriv_trans", "footnotes", "nonderiv_holding", "nonderiv_trans", "owner_signature", "reportingowner", "submission". Default NULL. NULL, tables returned.

title: SEC Form 3/4/5 bulk data — sec_form345
text: named list data.table::data.table()s, one per table ZIP file. table length 1, single data.table::data.table() returned.

title: SEC Form 3/4/5 bulk data — sec_form345
code: # \donttest{ # Get all tables for Q2 2024 data <- sec_form345(2024, 2) names(data) #> [1] "deriv_holding"    "deriv_trans"      "footnotes"        "nonderiv_holding" #> [5] "nonderiv_trans"   "owner_signature"  "reportingowner"   "submission"        # Get only the submission table sub <- sec_form345(2024, 2, "submission") # }

title: SEC company tickers — sec_tickers
text: Fetch full CIK--ticker mapping SEC.

title: SEC company tickers — sec_tickers
text: https://www.sec.gov/files/company_tickers.json

title: SEC company tickers — sec_tickers
text: data.table::data.table() columns cik, ticker, title.

title: SEC company tickers — sec_tickers
code: # \donttest{ tickers <- sec_tickers() tickers[ticker == "AAPL"] #>       cik ticker      title #>     <int> <char>     <char> #> 1: 320193   AAPL Apple Inc. # }

title: SEC transaction codes — sec_transaction_codes
text: Returns lookup table mapping SEC transaction codes human-readable descriptions.

title: SEC transaction codes — sec_transaction_codes
text: https://www.sec.gov/edgar/searchedgar/ownershipformcodes.html

title: SEC transaction codes — sec_transaction_codes
text: data.table::data.table() columns code description.

title: SEC transaction codes — sec_transaction_codes
code: sec_transaction_codes() #>       code #>     <char> #>  1:      A #>  2:      C #>  3:      D #>  4:      E #>  5:      F #>  6:      G #>  7:      H #>  8:      I #>  9:      J #> 10:      K #>                                           description #>                                                                                 <char> #>  1:                       Grant, award, or other acquisition pursuant to Rule 16b-3(d) #>  2:                                                  Conversion of derivative security #>  3:    Disposition to the issuer of issuer equity securities pursuant to Rule 16b-3(e) #>  4:                                            Expiration of short derivative position #>  5:       Expiration (or cancellation) of long derivative position with value received #>  6: Payment of exercise price or tax liability by delivering or withholding securities #>  7:                                                                     Bona fide gift #>  8: swap or instrument with similar characteristics #> 11:                                                 Small acquisition under Rule 16a-6 #> 12:      Exercise or conversion of derivative security exempted pursuant to Rule 16b-3 #> 13:                                   Exercise of out-of-the-money derivative security #> 14:                                                    Open market or private purchase #> 15:                                                        Open market or private sale #> 16:      Disposition pursuant to a tender of shares in a change of control transaction #> 17:                             Transaction voluntarily reported earlier than required #> 18:         Acquisition or disposition by will or the laws of descent and distribution #> 19:                       Exercise of in-the-money or at-the-money derivative security #> 20:                                       Deposit into or withdrawal from voting trust #> title: SEC insider transactions — sec_transactions
text: Download quarterly Form 3/4/5 data join nonderiv_trans table submission reportingowner tables accession_number.

title: SEC insider transactions — sec_transactions
text: https://www.sec.gov/data-research/sec-markets-data/insider-transactions-data-sets

title: SEC insider transactions — sec_transactions
text: year (integer(1)) year filing (e.g. 2024). quarter (integer(1)) fiscal quarter. Must 1 4.

title: SEC insider transactions — sec_transactions
text: data.table::data.table() transaction data joined submission reporting owner information.

title: insidertrade (development version)
text: edgar_insider_filings() filters EDGAR submissions Forms 3, 4, 5. edgar_submissions() fetches company filing metadata EDGAR API. sec_tickers() fetches full CIK--ticker mapping SEC. sec_cache_clear() deletes cached ZIP files. sec_cache_dir() returns cache directory path. sec_form345() downloads parses quarterly SEC Form 3/4/5 bulk data. sec_transaction_codes() returns lookup table SEC transaction codes descriptions. sec_transactions() returns insider transactions joined submission owner details.
